description: Zilliz is the company behind Milvus and Zilliz Cloud. Zilliz Cloud is a managed vector database and vector lakebase platform for storing, searching, and governing unstructured data for AI applications.
summary: Zilliz exposes a RESTful API for Zilliz Cloud, an MCP server, and a Zilliz CLI; documented developer auth uses Zilliz Cloud API keys, and cluster credentials are also used for data-plane API access.
